title: Praxis adapter config
description: Schema for a consuming repo's .praxis/config.json. Makes agent sessions deterministic: it answers which harness, which project, and which spec are active.

schemaVersion.description: Semantic version of this config shape (e.g. 1.0.0).

harnessRoot.description: Path (relative to the consuming repo) or pointer to the praxis harness root. Must resolve to an existing harness.

projectId.description: The project this repo belongs to. Must match a folder under the harness's projects/ and that project's PROJECT.md id. If it cannot be resolved, agents stop.

mode.description: Optional. 'local' (the default) keeps project memory in this product repo (.praxis/project/); 'central' reads project memory from the harness's projects/<projectId>/. When omitted, treated as 'local'.

projectMemory.description: Optional. Explicit path to this project's memory root, overriding the mode default.

activeSpec.description: Id or path of the spec currently being worked, or null when none is active.

models.description: Optional. Maps the semantic model tiers praxis commands use to runtime-specific model identifiers (e.g. on Claude Code: haiku/sonnet/opus, or a higher tier like fable for deep; on Codex: the OpenAI models the runtime exposes). When omitted, runtimes fall back to their own defaults. Doctrine: rules/model-tiers.md.

light.description: Model for retrieval/summarization only (context digests). Never a reasoning phase.

standard.description: Model for the default tier — structured transformation of prior artifacts. Every phase starts here.

deep.description: Model for frontier reasoning where depth demonstrably pays (hard design, complex root cause, high-stakes domain analysis).

generatedBy.description: Optional. The runtime/tool that generated this adapter (provenance).

praxisVersion.description: Optional. The praxis version that generated this adapter.
